about.heroTitle2: Infrastructure, One Layer at a Time
about.storyP1: Founded by Hasibul Munim and Momo Eun, HH Geotextile Solutions was born from a simple observation: Korea's infrastructure sector needed reliable, cost-effective geotextile sourcing — but contractors were paying inflated prices through multiple middlemen.
about.storyP2: We bridge the gap between global manufacturers and Korean construction sites, delivering factory-direct pricing with technical expertise that ensures the right product for every application.
about.storyP3: From road construction to coastal protection, our team understands the technical specifications that ensure project success. We don't just sell geotextile — we engineer solutions.
about.missionText: To become Korea's most trusted geotextile solutions partner by combining global sourcing capability with deep local market knowledge and uncompromising technical integrity.
about.value1Desc: Transparent pricing, honest specifications. No hidden costs, no compromises.
about.value2Desc: Technical knowledge that saves projects. We understand every GSM rating.
about.value3Desc: On-time delivery, every time. 15-30 days from order to Korean port.
about.value4Desc: Long-term relationships, not one-off transactions. Your success is our success.
about.momoBio1: With deep understanding of Korea's construction and infrastructure materials market, Momo Eun oversees HH Geotextile Solutions' Korean operations. Her local expertise ensures seamless communication and project coordination with Korean clients.
about.momoBio2: Fluent in both Korean and English, Momo provides personalized support throughout the entire process — from initial quotation to on-site delivery — with a thorough understanding of Korean engineering standards and regulations.
about.munimBio1: With deep expertise in geotechnical materials and extensive connections across Chinese and Indian manufacturing hubs, Hasibul Munim specializes in matching Korea's infrastructure needs with the right global suppliers.
about.munimBio2: From road projects to coastal protection, he understands the technical specifications that ensure project success. Every recommendation he makes is backed by engineering data and real-world project experience.

resourcesPage.faq1Q: What is the difference between woven and non-woven geotextile?
resourcesPage.faq1A: Non-woven geotextiles are needle-punched fabrics used for filtration, drainage, and separation. They have high permeability. Woven geotextiles are made by weaving fibers together, providing high tensile strength for reinforcement and stabilization applications.
resourcesPage.faq2Q: Which GSM do I need for my road project?
resourcesPage.faq2A: For light-duty roads and drainage, 150-200 GSM is typical. Highway stabilization typically requires 250 GSM. Heavy-duty roads and railway embankments need 300-400 GSM. We provide free consultation to help you choose.
resourcesPage.faq3Q: How long does delivery take from China?
resourcesPage.faq3A: Standard delivery from China to Korean port takes 7-15 days. We support Incheon, Busan, and Pyeongtaek ports. We coordinate logistics door-to-door.
resourcesPage.faq4Q: Do you provide samples for testing?
resourcesPage.faq4A: Yes, we provide free sample rolls for testing before bulk order. Samples typically include a small roll (1-2m) with the product data sheet.
resourcesPage.faq5Q: What is your minimum order quantity?
resourcesPage.faq5A: Our MOQ is typically one 20ft container (approximately 5,000-8,000 SQM depending on GSM). For large projects, we can arrange partial shipments.
resourcesPage.faq6Q: Can you help with Korean construction standard specifications?
resourcesPage.faq6A: Absolutely. We have extensive experience with Korean infrastructure compliance. We review specifications, match grades, and provide all required certification and test reports.
resourcesPage.faq7Q: What is the import duty on geotextile from China?
resourcesPage.faq7A: Under the FTA (Free Trade Agreement), geotextile imports from China to Korea are mostly duty-free or significantly reduced. We provide current duty rates as part of our quotation.
resourcesPage.faq8Q: Do you offer credit terms for large contractors?
resourcesPage.faq8A: Credit terms are available for established contractors and government projects on a case-by-case basis. Contact us to discuss your requirements.
resourcesPage.faqCtaDesc: Our technical team is ready to help. Reach out for personalized guidance.
